form.formComment: Returns from a five-and-a-half months spell after being tipped out on the back of a fifth (23.51) over 400m at The Gardens. Looks tested.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a five-and-a-half months spell after being tipped out on the back of a fifth (23.51) over 400m at The Gardens. Looks tested.

form.formComment: Back from a spell of five months. Won two starts back when well in the market at The Gardens over 400m. Last start finished 3rd over 400m at this track beaten 6 lengths (22.97) behind Hey Mickey in a Mix 2/3 on November 17. Looks a solid contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Back from a spell of five months. Won two starts back when well in the market at The Gardens over 400m. Last start finished 3rd over 400m at this track beaten 6 lengths (22.97) behind Hey Mickey in a Mix 2/3 on November 17. Looks a solid contender.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.18) at The Gardens in a Mix 1/2/3, finishing seventh and beaten 8 lengths. Has three successes and two minors from nine starts from box 3. Looks a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (23.18) at The Gardens in a Mix 1/2/3, finishing seventh and beaten 8 lengths. Has three successes and two minors from nine starts from box 3. Looks a leading chance.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by half a length at this track (22.64) beating Magic Wylde in a Mix 3/4 on March 30. Others preferred on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage sixth but before that won by half a length at this track (22.64) beating Magic Wylde in a Mix 3/4 on March 30. Others preferred on this occasion.

form.formComment: Last start winner at Wentworth Park over 520m running a time of 29.40. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start winner at Wentworth Park over 520m running a time of 29.40. Coming out of a very strong form race. Expected to go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together shortly after the start and again entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 4 length third but did clock a solid 22.42 over the 400m trip. Bold showing expected but prefer each way again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 4 length third but did clock a solid 22.42 over the 400m trip. Bold showing expected but prefer each way again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Exiting the back straight galloped onto the hind quarters.
Tightened for room rounding the home turn.
Galloped on rounding the turn into the front straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 300m at Taree Super Track. This looks too tough.
